title: Rorida arabica
taxonomy: Rorida arabica is a species of plant that belongs to the family Commelinaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the spiderwort family. The Commelinaceae family is part of the larger order Commelinales, which includes over 1,100 species of plants. The order Commelinales is further classified under the subclass Commelinidae, within the class Liliopsida or monocots. The class Liliopsida is one of the two main classes of flowering plants, the other being the class Rosopsida or dicots.
